name: Jordan Almond Bark
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a baking sheet with foil and set aside.
2. In a 2-quart casserole, microwave the candy coating at 50% power for 4 to 6 minutes, or until it can be stirred smoothly. Stir twice and add the almonds.
3. Spread the mixture to a thickness of 1/4 to 1/2 inch on the prepared baking sheet.
4. Allow to set or chill until firm.
5. Break into pieces.
6. Store in a cool, dry place.
Makes 2 lbs.
